title: Silent Screenshots
description: Removes the chat message after taking a screenshot
body:
# Silent Screenshots

A very simple Minecraft mod that removes the "Screenshot taken" chat message.

When taking multiple screenshots in a row, old screenshot messages always appear in the newer screenshots.
This prevents that from happening.

The mod comes with a config that allows for the following actions to happen upon taking a screenshot:
- display a chat message (vanilla behaviour)
- display an action bar message
- play a sound

By default, it will play a sound, but this can be tweaked in the config that gets generated on the first game launch.


## Installation
This mod has been written for Minecraft >= 1.18.
